title: Alex Mena
content:
Alex Mena
Executive Editor
Miami Herald / el Nuevo Herald
Thank you, Oneisys
From: Mena, Alex &[REDACTED:EMAIL ADDRESS]>
Sent: Thursday, February 8, 2024 4:13 PM
To: Echenique, Oneisys (MDC Foundation) &[REDACTED:EMAIL ADDRESS]>
Subject: Re: 2024 MDC Alumni Hall of Fame - Congratulations!
********************** EXTERNAL EMAIL **********************

PLEASE USE CAUTION WHEN CLICKING LINKS OR ATTACHMENTS

Hello. I have attached my resume.
--What does Miami Dade College mean to you?
Miami Dade College has been the reason for my success. Professor David Merves's unwavering support and encouragement propelled me to achieve my dream of becoming the executive editor of the Miami Herald and el Nuevo Herald. Without the guidance and opportunities provided by MDC, my journey here today would not have been possible.
--How did your experience as a Miami Dade College student influence your career direction?
My time as a Miami Dade College student was instrumental in shaping my career. Balancing my dedication to the student newspaper, the Falcon Times, with my role as a clerk at the Herald instilled in me a profound appreciation for hard work and determination. This experience underscored the belief that with diligence and perseverance, success in anything you want to achieve is possible.
